body_txt: A show with a number of reports on particular subjects (e.g., current events, entertainment, bungee jumping) interspersed with links by presenters (who appear in the reports). This may be a children's show, as in Blue Peter , or a news magazine such as 60 Minutes or 20/20 . Clip Show can often be a subtrope. See also: print-media Magazines . Live-Action TV Print Media Radio Web Video  Live-Action TV Webcomics Western Animation
